title: multi-turn reasoning case should not feed prior reasoning_content back

messages.content: If there are 2 providers and each has 3 tests, how many tests?
Add one provider with 3 more tests. What is the new total?

expect.notes: Do not include any previous reasoning_content in messages; docs say reasoning content is not appended to next-round context. 开启判定要求出现 reasoning_content 或 reasoning_tokens/thinking_tokens 证据。
